zh.lifeSummary: 當Eve De Clavering於大約1295年出生在英國時，她的父親John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke31歲，母親Hawise de Tibetot26歲。她於1305年與Baron Thomas Audley在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1369年9月20日在英國諾福爾可明日香享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eve De Clavering于大约1295年出生在英国时，她的父亲John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke31岁，母亲Hawise de Tibetot26岁。她于1305年与Baron Thomas Audley在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1369年9月20日在英国諾福爾可明日香享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clavering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: Eve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name borne in the Bible by the first woman, created from one of Adam's ribs (Genesis 2:22). It derives, via Latin Eva, from Hebrew Havva, which is considered to be a variant of the vocabulary word hayya ‘living’ or ‘animal’. Adam gave names to all the animals (Genesis 2:19–20) and then to his wife, who was ‘the mother of all living’ (Genesis 3:20).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eve De Clavering was born about 1295, in England, her father, John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke, was 31 and her mother, Hawise de Tibetot, was 26. She married Baron Thomas Audley in 1305, in England, United Kingdom. She died on 20 September 1369, in Langley, Norfolk, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eve De Clavering est née environ 1295, à Angleterre, son père, John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Tibetot, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Baron Thomas Audley en 1305, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1369, à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eve De Clavering um 1295 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke 31 und ihre Mutter Hawise de Tibetot 26. Sie hat 1305 in England, United Kingdom Baron Thomas Audley geheiratet. Sie starb am 20. September 1369 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Langley, Norfolk, England und wurde in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eve De Clavering è nata il circa 1295 nel England, sua padre, John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Hawise de Tibetot, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Baron Thomas Audley nel 1305, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 20 settembre 1369, nel Langley, Norfolk, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Langley, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eve De Claveringが約1295年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stokeは31歳，母Hawise de Tibetotは26歳であった。1305年にイギリスイギリスでBaron Thomas Audleyと結婚した。彼女は1369年9月20日にイギリスノーフォルクラングリーで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eve De Clavering(이)가 대략 1295년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Tibetot(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Baron Thomas Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1369년 9월 20일 영국 노르폴크 랭글리에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eve De Clavering nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Tibetot, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron Thomas Audley em 1305, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1369, em Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eve De Clavering родилась около 1295 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Tibetot, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron Thomas Audley в 1305 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 20 сентября 1369 г. в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Baron Thomas Audley en 1305, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
